title: The Container Door Closed
subtitle: Before the road began, Toyotaki first had to disappear into a 20-foot container.
summary: Before the 306-day road journey began, Toyotaki was loaded into a 20-foot container at Port Klang and shipped toward Kolkata.

title: Traffic Light Equation
subtitle: Two oranges, one laughing driver, one impatient policeman, infinite memories.
summary: At a Kolkata traffic light, the whole world moved too fast except the fruit seller and two glowing oranges.

title: Thirty Minutes of Moonlight
subtitle: A full moon window, a silent Taj Mahal, and a family photo taken in the dark.
summary: A rare full moon viewing window at Taj Mahal turned into a silent thirty-minute memory under moonlight.
